meta.experiment_name: E6 Dynamic threat assessment with F2 capability degradation
meta.scenario_description: The original seven-target mixed scenario restored from Git and used as the common baseline for formation ablation experiments.
meta.formation_mode_description: Dynamic heterogeneous formation with progressive F2 capability degradation
